label: Bundle Templates
description: Pre-built bundle template gallery with category badges, estimated cost/profit, and execution step preview.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.7.note: added empty state when templates.length===0 (was rendering an empty grid with no message).

0.8.note: — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. Fixed: wired readOnly from context to disable template load buttons in batch mode.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No mock imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field. 0.7 Fixed: added empty state when templates.length===0 (was rendering an empty grid with no message). 0.8 N/A — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors. 0.9 No dead code. Fixed: wired readOnly from context to disable template load buttons in batch mode.

1.1.note: All data from useBundlesData() hook (templates, loadTemplate, showTemplates, setShowTemplates, steps, readOnly).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope(); hasDefiDesk derived from organizationIds.

1.3.note: Org filter: hasDefiDesk filters FLASH_BORROW/FLASH_REPAY templates for orgs without a DeFi desk. 1.4-1.5 N/A — template list is scoped by org; client/strategy sub-filtering not applicable for template gallery.

1.4.note: 1.5 N/A — template list is scoped by org; client/strategy sub-filtering not applicable for template gallery.

1.5.note: — template list is scoped by org; client/strategy sub-filtering not applicable for template gallery.

1.6.note: Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → full template list returned.

1.7.note: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES fixture still in lib/mocks/fixtures/bundle-templates (context concern, not widget). Template reference data in lib/config/services/bundle.config is correct.

knownIssues: BUNDLE_TEMPLATES fixture still in lib/mocks/fixtures/bundle-templates — should migrate to lib/config/ or lib/constants/ (context-level fix, not widget-level)
findings: Fixed: empty state added when templates array is empty (scope-filtered to zero)
readOnly flag wired to disable template load buttons in batch mode
